           +---------+
           |  Input  |
           +----++---+
                ++
+[  Process  ]--oo---------------+
|                |               |
|                v               |
|           +---------+          |
|           |  Start  |          |
|           +----+----+          |
|                |               |
|        +-------+-------+       |
|        v               v       |
|  +----------+    +----------+  |
|  |  Path 1  |    |  Path 2  |  |
|  +-----+----+    +-----+----+  |
|        |               |       |
|        +-------+-------+       |
|                v               |
|            +-------+           |
|            |  End  |           |
|            +---+---+           |
|                |               |
+---------------oo---------------+
                v
          +----------+
          |  Output  |
          +----------+
